hero.headline: Precision. Beauty. Confidence.
hero.subtitle: Passionate about natural beauty, I create harmonious brows that enhance your unique features and give you confidence every day.

services.label: Services
services.heading: Contour. Symmetry. Elegance.
services.description: Whether you want perfect brows, fuller lashes, or flawless semi-permanent makeup, these services complement each other to highlight your unique beauty.

shaping.name: Shaping & Contouring
shaping.desc: Perfect shape tailored to your face structure, with precise waxing and threading techniques.

lamination.name: Lamination
lamination.desc: Lifted, set, and visibly fuller brows and lashes with lasting results up to 8 weeks.

micropigmentation.name: Micropigmentation
micropigmentation.desc: Semi-permanent makeup for wake-up-ready brows — microblading, powder brows, or combo technique.

pricelist.label: Transparent Pricing
pricelist.heading: Price List
pricelist.description: Professional treatments tailored to enhance your natural beauty. Every session is an investment in yourself.
pricelist.footnote: All prices include a free consultation. Touch-up pricing applies within 6 months of initial treatment.

gallery.label: Portfolio
gallery.heading: Gallery
gallery.description: Real results, real transformations. Every brow tells a story.

courses.label: Education
courses.heading: Learn from the Best
courses.description: Turn your passion for brows into a thriving career with Ilknur's hands-on training programs.

footer.tagline: Premium brow artistry — where precision meets beauty.
